id.description: HTML id applied to the menubar root element. Auto-generated when omitted.

label.description: Accessible label for the menubar, applied as aria-label. Ignored when labelledBy is set. Default `Application menu`.

labelledBy.description: ID of an existing element whose text labels the menubar, applied as aria-labelledby. Takes precedence over label.

class.description: Additional class names merged with the component's root class.
